subject: Life Skills
title: Safety Squad
tagline: Learn the rules of personal safety at home, school and in public!

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.question: What number do you call in an emergency in South Africa?

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.question: What should you do before crossing the road?
options: Stop, drop and roll, then get outside
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Look both ways is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Look both ways.

stages.name: Stage 3
stages.question: What should you never do with strangers?
options: Get in a car with them
Find a shop worker or security guard
stages.correctOption: Get in a car with them
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Get in a car with them is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Get in a car with them.

stages.name: Stage 4
stages.question: What should you do if you get lost in a shop?
options: Get in a car with them
Find a shop worker or security guard
Stop, drop and roll, then get outside
stages.correctOption: Find a shop worker or security guard
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Find a shop worker or security guard is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Find a shop worker or security guard.

stages.name: Stage 5
stages.question: What should you wear when riding a bicycle?
options: Stop, drop and roll, then get outside
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! A helmet is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is A helmet.

stages.name: Stage 6
stages.question: What should you do if there is a fire?
options: Get in a car with them
Stop, drop and roll, then get outside
stages.correctOption: Stop, drop and roll, then get outside
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Stop, drop and roll, then get outside is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Stop, drop and roll, then get outside.

stages.name: Stage 7
stages.question: Who can you talk to if someone makes you feel unsafe?
options: Stop, drop and roll, then get outside
Find a shop worker or security guard
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! A trusted adult is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is A trusted adult.

stages.name: Stage 8
stages.question: What should you do before eating food from someone you don't know?
options: Find a shop worker or security guard
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Ask a parent first is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Ask a parent first.

stages.name: Stage 9
stages.question: What should you never do at a swimming pool without an adult?
options: Get in a car with them
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Never swim alone is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Never swim alone.

stages.name: Stage 10
stages.question: What should you remember to carry in case of emergency?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! A parent's phone number is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is A parent's phone number.
